suggestions.rationale: DevNet 0 was targeted for late April (Interop week). Critical to assess launch status, identify blockers, and determine if the merged ePBS+BAL approach is stable enough for progression.

suggestions.topic: Partial slot proofs implementation completion across all clients
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #173 established 'Cannot ship ePBS without partial slot proofs in all clients' as a hard dependency. Teku, Lodestar, and Nimbus implementations were incomplete as of January, with no confirmation of completion in subsequent calls.

suggestions.topic: Hegotá non-headliner proposal window closure and CFI timeline
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #177 noted the non-headliner proposal window opened but end date is TBD based on Glamsterdam progress. Need to set concrete deadline and CFI timeline to maintain fork schedule momentum.

suggestions.topic: EIP-4788 (parent beacon block root) gaps under ePBS with empty payloads
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #176 identified critical issue where 4788 will have gaps for empty payloads under ePBS. Stakeholder outreach to Lido, Rocketpool, and EigenLayer was assigned but not confirmed completed. Protocol teams prefer backfilling solution.

suggestions.topic: Execution request optimization: removal from envelope
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #177 deferred optimization of duplicated execution requests. PR was to be opened by Nico Flaig to remove requests from envelope structure. Efficiency gain may be significant for DevNet progression.

suggestions.topic: Partial slashing (EIP-8136/8045) scope and Interop testing plan
suggestions.rationale: EIP-8136 added to Glamsterdam as optional in ACDC #177. Scope expansion for EIP-8045 deferred to Interop discussion. Need clarity on testing requirements and whether to promote from optional to required.

suggestions.topic: SSZ Engine API transport and redesign decision
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #176 noted significant blob performance gains with SSZ transport but debate exists on shipping SSZ immediately vs full Engine API redesign. Discussion deferred to ACDE with no confirmed follow-up.

suggestions.topic: Cell-level deltas rollout status and backwards compatibility verification
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #174 noted cell-level deltas can deploy pre-Amsterdam with progressive rollout. Lighthouse nearly done, Prism in review, Lodestar debugging as of February. Status update would confirm readiness for production.
